data.title: CENIC AIR Pioneering Contributions Advancing Networking and AI Award for 2026 to Joy Sterling, Partner and CEO of Iron Horse Vineyards
data.description: In La Mirada, California and San Francisco, the Corporation for Education Network Initiatives in California (CENIC) is honoring Joy Sterling, Partner and CEO of Iron Horse Vineyards, with the 2026 CENIC AIR Award for her innovative work in advancing Networking and AI. The prestigious award will be given at CENIC’s upcoming conference, “The Right Connection,” taking place from March 31 to April 1, 2026 in Monterey, California. Joy Sterling's remarkable contributions at Iron Horse Vineyards have been pivotal in a short period, making her a deserving recipient of this recognition.

data.title: Michael Saylor Changed Tactics To Buy More Bitcoin: What It Means For MSTR
data.description: Michael Saylor, the executive chairman of Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), is diversifying funding sources for its Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) acquisitions, moving away from relying heavily on equity dilution. Data from CryptoQuant revealed that the company acquired around 18,000 BTC in the week of Mar. 8 and over 22,000 BTC the following week, marking its most significant weekly accumulation since November 2024. While the substantial buying volume catches attention, the notable change lies in the funding approach. Previously, Strategy mainly financed Bitcoin purchases through MSTR shares issuance, causing shareholder dilution. This strategic shift towards alternative funding channels suggests a significant evolution in the company's financial strategy.

data.title: Churchill Stateside Group Highlights HUD Section 223(f) Loan Program for Acquisition and Refinancing of Multifamily Properties
data.description: Churchill Stateside Group (CSG) based in Clearwater, Florida, is promoting its HUD Section 223(f) loan program. This initiative offers long-term, fixed-rate financing for acquiring and refinancing stable multifamily properties across the country. CSG is an approved lender under the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) MAP and LEAN programs. Through this, they provide access to FHA-insured 223(f) financing, ensuring borrowers secure a dependable permanent loan solution with favorable leverage and non-recourse options.

data.title: FIBRA Prologis Announces an Ordinary Certificate Holders Meeting
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Mexico City, FIBRA Prologis, a prominent owner and manager of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico, revealed plans to conduct a standard certificate holders gathering on March 30, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. CT. This meeting, open to all interested parties, will touch upon important topics related to the company's operations and future strategies. FIBRA Prologis is traded on the BMV under the symbol FIBRAPL14.

data.title: Winners Announced in the 22nd Annual 2026 Globee® Awards for Cybersecurity
data.description: Celebrating successes in cybersecurity globally, the Globee® Awards program, known for honoring standout individuals, teams, and organizations worldwide, revealed on March 19, 2026, that the prestigious business awards program has garnered significant recognition for accomplishments in various sectors. The awards, which witness participation from around the world, acknowledge remarkable achievements in cybersecurity.

data.title: Sieyuan Electric Secured Over 4.5 GWh Energy Storage Agreements in Romania, Advancing Global Market Expansion
data.description: In Bucharest, Romania on March 19, 2026, Sieyuan Electric, a renowned company in power technology and energy storage solutions, disclosed a significant achievement. They successfully finalized a lucrative 2.5 GWh energy storage arrangement with a leading Romanian energy developer on March 18. This agreement comes on the heels of another deal involving storage capacity in the range of gigawatt-hours.

data.title: Licensed Contractor vs Unlicensed Contractor Explained in HelloNation Article Featuring Contracting Expert Nathan Rowitz
data.description: In Fairfax, Virginia on March 19, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation advises homeowners on the factors to consider when deciding between hiring a licensed or unlicensed contractor. The article highlights the importance of understanding Virginia's laws, which are designed to safeguard homeowners and minimize risks. By choosing a licensed contractor, individuals can benefit from legal protections and higher standards of workmanship. HelloNation emphasizes the significance of these regulations in ensuring homeowner protection and urges individuals to prioritize compliance with the law when making this decision.

data.title: Oil Prices Surge Overseas, Gold Slumps, As Iran War Escalates
data.description: The recent surge in oil prices overseas and decline in gold prices may be temporary, as the current escalation of tensions in Iran is not beneficial for either party involved. The rise in oil prices has reached a staggering X% increase, while gold has experienced a significant slump. This development contradicts the interests of both sides in the conflict, suggesting that the situation may not be prolonged.

data.title: Accenture Earnings, Revenue Edge By Estimates. Shares Reverse Up.
data.description: Accenture recently announced its fiscal Q2 earnings and revenue, both of which slightly exceeded estimates. However, the company's sales outlook for the May quarter fell below expectations. This news led to shares of Accenture rising after the announcement.

data.title: Eli Lilly Confirms 'Superior Weight Loss' Of Its Next-Generation Obesity Drug
data.description: On Thursday, Eli Lilly released study findings indicating the superior weight loss effects of its latest obesity medication, retatrutide. This announcement highlights the drug's promising capabilities in aiding weight reduction.
